name: Cleopatra's Gaze 3D Mink Lashes
description: Crafted with the finest multi-dimensional faux mink fibers, Cleopatra's Gaze delivers unparalleled depth and drama, reminiscent of ancient royalty.

name: Zamalek Silk Winged Lash
description: Designed for the sophisticated Zamalek socialite, this ultra-fine silk lash offers a subtle, elongated wing for a classic cat-eye allure.

name: Cairo Nights Dramatic Lash
description: Turn heads after dark with Cairo Nights. This maximum-volume lash offers dense, criss-cross layering to make eyes pop under twilight.

name: Sahel Sunset Natural Wispy
description: Perfect for beach days and coastal evenings, Sahel Sunset blends seamlessly with natural lashes for an effortless, sun-soaked look.

name: Nile Queen Volume Lash
description: Rule your kingdom with the Nile Queen. Featuring dense volume at the root tapering to fluttery tips, it creates a majestic, wide-eyed look.

name: Giza Glamour Feather-Light Lash
description: Giza Glamour features feather-light construction with dramatic length, perfect for red-carpet events and high-fashion editorial styling.

name: Heliopolis Honey Everyday Lash
description: The ultimate everyday lash for the modern Heliopolis woman, offering natural volume, flexible bands, and comfortable all-day wear.

name: Lotus Bloom Flutter Lash
description: Inspired by the sacred lotus, this delicate lash flares gently outward, opening up the eyes with soft, staggered lengths.

name: Mirage Velvet Fluffy Lash
description: Unbelievably soft and luxurious, Mirage Velvet mimics natural lash hair with ultra-fine luxury fibers that hold their shape beautifully.

name: Dahab Dream Hybrid Lash
description: Capture the bohemian luxury of Dahab with this texturized, hybrid lash that combines wispy lengths with dense root definitions.

name: El Gouna Sun-Kissed Lash
description: Infused with beachy vibes, El Gouna lashes are perfectly spaced to provide a natural, breezy lift suitable for any coastal escape.

name: Red Sea Siren Lash
description: Channel the mysterious depth of the Red Sea. A gorgeous dramatic lash featuring high-density criss-cross patterns.

name: Alexandria Pearl Soft Lash
description: Classy and refined, the Alexandria Pearl is a semi-demure lash designed to add touchable length and light volume to any daytime makeup.

name: Sina Silk Wispy Lash
description: Sina Silk lashes are handcrafted with premium synthetic silk, offering a high-sheen, ultra-soft texture that feels completely weightless.

name: Pharaoh Gold 3D Lash
description: Gilded beauty for special occasions. Pharaoh Gold features multi-layered criss-cross styling for a brilliant, eye-opening effect.

name: Sahara Sand Delicate Lash
description: Mimicking the soft contours of desert dunes, Sahara Sand offers a delicate, textured style with alternating long and short fibers.

name: Zaitouna Olive Soft Lash
description: Zaitouna Olive lashes bring a soft, earthy elegance with a olive-toned tint blended into deep black fibers for a unique gaze.

name: Nefertiti Crown Dramatic Lash
description: Inspired by Queen Nefertiti, this majestic lash features bold length and structured curl to frame the face with regal symmetry.

name: Cairo Chic Light Lash
description: Step out in style with Cairo Chic. A tapered lash that emphasizes the outer corners for a modern, sophisticated upturn.

name: Maadi Muse Natural Lash
description: Perfect for the Maadi resident's casual elegance. A subtle, lightweight lash that enhances your natural density without looking heavy.

name: Isis Wing Goddess Lash
description: Channel the power of the goddess Isis. A dramatic, wide-winged lash that spreads outwards for a captivating, theatrical look.

name: Zamalek Twilight Silk Lash
description: Zamalek Twilight offers soft silk fibers that catch the light beautifully, perfect for high-class dinners and gallery openings.

name: Dahab Oasis Fluff Lash
description: Live the slow, luxurious life with Dahab Oasis. This lash features scattered clusters for a modern, textured, bohemian look.

name: El Gouna Glitz Lash
description: Add some sparkles to your evening. El Gouna Glitz offers subtle, micro-shimmer fibers woven into a high-volume winged lash.

name: Cairo Boulevard Lash
description: Inspired by Cairo's bustling avenues, this lash offers bold, confident volume that stands out in any crowd.

name: Nubian Queen Premium Lash
description: A majestic addition to the collection, Nubian Queen features deep, dark synthetic mink fibers with a stunning glossy finish.

name: Siwa Breeze Feather Lash
description: Light as a Siwa oasis breeze. A super-delicate lash with an invisible band for the ultimate 'no-makeup' lash extension look.

name: Red Sea Royal Lash
description: Designed for royalty, Red Sea Royal features dramatic curls and high-density layering that commands attention.

name: Soma Bay Sheer Lash
description: Clean, fresh, and beautiful. Soma Bay Sheer offers lightweight length with a flexible band that adapts to any eye shape.

name: Karnak Classic Lash
description: Celebrate timeless beauty with the Karnak Classic. A balanced lash offering moderate volume and uniform length.

name: Luxor Luxe Mink Lash
description: Luxor Luxe Mink lashes represent the peak of luxury beauty, featuring hand-tied premium fibers with a signature double-curl.

name: Aswan Amber Soft Lash
description: Aswan Amber is designed with warm, dark-brown undertones mixed with classic black fibers to complement hazel and brown eyes.

name: Zamalek Pearl Lash
description: Delicately layered like fine jewelry, Zamalek Pearl adds a luminous, wide-awake effect with a subtle lift at the center.

name: Cairo Stardust Winged Lash
description: Cairo Stardust features fine, wispy tips that create a starry, ethereal look suitable for evening galas.

name: Sahel Mist Everyday Lash
description: Sahel Mist features a soft, semi-matte finish that mimics natural lashes, ideal for casual beach clubs and daytime brunches.

name: Oasis Orchid Hybrid Lash
description: The Oasis Orchid features flared outer corners and an ultra-lightweight cotton band for comfort that lasts from day to night.

name: Mediterranean Muse Lash
description: Inspired by coastal elegance, Mediterranean Muse offers high-definition definition with natural volume and a clean lash line.

name: Pyramid Peak Dramatic Lash
description: Reach new heights of beauty with Pyramid Peak. A high-impact lash featuring structural volume and a dramatic curl.

name: Nile Nectar Light Lash
description: Lightweight and refreshing like a sweet drink, Nile Nectar offers a subtle, wispy curl that defines without overpowering.

name: Suez Silk Wispy Lash
description: The Suez Silk offers a classic, elongated style with ultra-fine premium fibers that blend seamlessly into your natural lash line.

name: Sahel Sunset High-Gloss Nails
description: Transport yourself to the North Coast with Sahel Sunset. These high-gloss press-ons feature a warm ombre gradient of orange and pink.

name: Cairo Classic Red Press-Ons
description: The quintessential Egyptian beauty staple. Cairo Classic Red features a rich, deep crimson color with a mirror-like high-gloss finish.

name: Alexandria Pearl Gel Nails
description: Inspired by Mediterranean sea pearls, this gel set offers an iridescent, luminous finish that reflects pastel pinks and blues.

name: Giza Gold Foil Mani Set
description: Make a royal statement. This premium set features hand-applied 24k-style gold foil flakes over a soft, milky-white base.

name: Pyramids Nude Matte Nails
description: A timeless, minimalist set. Pyramids Nude offers a sophisticated matte finish in a universally flattering warm beige undertone.

name: Mirage Burgundy Glossy Nails
description: Indulge in the rich, velvety tones of Mirage Burgundy. A glossy, high-impact set that exudes cold-weather sophistication.

name: Lotus Blossom Pink Set
description: Delicate and fresh, the Lotus Blossom set features soft pink tones with a subtle glossy finish, ideal for everyday elegance.

name: Oasis Khaki Matte Set
description: Channel chic utility with Oasis Khaki. A modern matte finish in an earthy green tone that pairs perfectly with linen and gold jewelry.

name: Zamalek Pink Polish Nails
description: A playful, feminine classic inspired by Zamalek's boutique style. Features a vibrant, shiny bubblegum pink finish.

name: Dahab Dream Chrome Nails
description: Shine like the Dahab waters. These chrome press-ons offer a holographic finish that shifts from silver to warm gold in sunlight.

name: El Gouna Glitz Press-Ons
description: Bring the party to your fingertips. El Gouna Glitz features encapsulated biodegradable glitter in a durable gel overlay.

name: Red Sea Coral Nails
description: Bright, energetic, and summery. Red Sea Coral features a warm, reddish-orange gloss that perfectly complements sun-kissed skin.

name: Sina Sands Textured Set
description: A tactile masterpiece. Sina Sands features a unique textured satin finish that mimics the fine, wind-swept sands of Sinai.

name: Cairo Midnight Black Gel
description: Deep as the Cairo night. This solid black gel set features a super-slick high-gloss topcoat that resists scratches.

name: Heliopolis Emerald High-Gloss
description: Rich and royal. Heliopolis Emerald offers a deep, jewel-toned green with a luxurious high-gloss finish that turns heads.

name: Egyptian Rose Glossy Nails
description: A classic, romantic rose tone with a glossy gel finish, inspired by the damask roses cultivated in the Nile Delta.

name: Nubian Gold Accent Set
description: Inspired by Nubian craftsmanship. This set combines matte black nails with stunning, hand-painted gold accent designs.

name: Cleopatra Emerald Velvet Nails
description: Deep velvet-textured green with a magnetic cat-eye effect, reminiscent of Cleopatra's favorite emerald jewels.

name: Sahara Dust Satin Nails
description: A soft, sophisticated semi-matte satin finish in a light sandy beige, ideal for low-profile, luxury everyday wear.

name: Siwa Olive Matte Nails
description: Inspired by the lush olive groves of Siwa. This set features a rich olive-drab color with a smooth, velvety matte finish.

name: Zamalek Cafe Au Lait Nails
description: A warm, creamy brown nude shade that resembles Cairo's favorite morning coffee, featuring a flawless gel gloss.

name: Cairo Boulevard Glossy Nails
description: Bold and trendy. Cairo Boulevard features clean geometric line art over a sheer nude base, finished with high-gloss gel.

name: Maadi Mint Pastel Nails
description: A refreshing pastel mint green set with a high-shine finish, perfect for hot summer days in the gardens of Maadi.

name: Lotus Leaf Sage Nails
description: A calming, earthy sage green set inspired by the lotus leaf, finished with a smooth, semi-gloss protective topcoat.

name: Sahel Shell High-Gloss Nails
description: Mimicking the interior of precious sea shells, this set offers a delicate, pearlescent finish with hints of gold shimmer.

name: Lotus Petal Soft Pink Nails
description: An ultra-sheer, milky pink finish that gives a clean, healthy look to your natural nails, with a high-gloss protective barrier.

name: Aswan Amethyst Jewel Nails
description: Deep amethyst purple gel nails featuring a subtle holographic shimmer that mimics the rare gemstones of Upper Egypt.

name: Luxor Lapis Lazuli Nails
description: Inspired by the historic stones of Luxor. A royal lapis lazuli blue with tiny gold flakes embedded within high-gloss gel.

name: Pharaoh Platinum Mirror Nails
description: Get the ultimate reflective look. Pharaoh Platinum offers a flawless mirror chrome finish that looks like molten silver.

name: Karnak Clay Terracotta Nails
description: A warm, earthy terracotta shade inspired by the ancient clay of Karnak, complete with a modern, velvety matte finish.

name: Soma Bay Aqua Gel Nails
description: Capturing the crystal-clear waters of Soma Bay. A vibrant, translucent aqua gel finish that looks fresh and aquatic.

name: Dahab Turquoise Chrome
description: Holographic chrome that shifts from turquoise to deep sea blue, inspired by the colorful coral reefs of Dahab.

name: Alexandria Sky Pastel Nails
description: A soft, dreamy pastel blue that evokes the clear skies of Alexandria, finished with a durable, high-gloss topcoat.

name: Giza Sandstone Shimmer Nails
description: A warm sandstone color infused with ultra-fine gold shimmer that catches the light beautifully, like Giza sands at noon.

name: Midnight Nile Navy Nails
description: Deep navy blue gel nails that capture the depth of the Nile under a starry night, complete with a high-shine protective coat.

name: Cairo Contour Makeup Blender
description: An ergonomically designed makeup sponge that provides a flawless, airbrushed finish, essential for Cairo's high-glam looks.

name: Cleopatra Precision Lash Tweezers
description: Crafted from premium surgical-grade stainless steel, these tweezers offer razor-sharp alignment for flawless lash placement.

name: Nile Velvet Blending Sponge
description: An ultra-soft, latex-free blending sponge that expands when wet, designed to blend foundations seamlessly with minimal product absorption.

name: Rose Gold Lash Applicator
description: Apply your false eyelashes like a professional. This ergonomic tool provides a secure grip and perfect placement every time.

name: Sculpting Wedge Sponge Kit
description: A collection of 6 high-density makeup wedges, perfect for baking, contouring, and applying powder to hard-to-reach areas.

name: Diva Keepsake Lash Box
description: A luxurious, velvet-lined magnetic box designed to store up to 3 pairs of premium eyelashes in pristine condition.

name: Midnight Gold Gift Box
description: The ultimate luxury presentation. A sturdy, midnight-black gift box detailed with hot-stamped gold foil accents.

name: Alabaster Presentation Case
description: Inspired by Egyptian alabaster, this hard-shell presentation case protects your luxury nails and accessories during travel.

name: Zamalek Emerald Makeup Case
description: A spacious, emerald-green velvet cosmetic case with customizable dividers and a secure zip closure, styled in Zamalek.

name: Sahara Leatherette Brush Roll
description: A premium faux-leather roll designed to house up to 12 makeup brushes, keeping them clean and organized on the go.

name: Heliopolis Precision Tweezer Set
description: A set of three premium tweezers (slant, point, and flat) housed in a matching leather pouch, perfect for brow and lash detailing.

name: Lotus Petal Makeup Sponge
description: A unique teardrop-shaped sponge with a flat edge for precision baking and contouring around the nose and under the eyes.

name: Sahel Sand Travel Beauty Pouch
description: Water-resistant and stylish, this travel pouch keeps all your beauty essentials secure, featuring Sahel-inspired details.

name: El Gouna Lash Adhesive (Clear)
description: A medical-grade, latex-free clear lash adhesive that offers 48-hour hold, resisting heat, humidity, and coastal breezes.

name: Cairo Night Lash Adhesive (Dark)
description: A dark-toned lash adhesive that blends seamlessly with black eyeliner for a bold, high-drama finish that lasts all night.

name: Pharaoh Gold Eyelash Curler
description: A premium, gold-plated eyelash curler with an ergonomic handle and soft silicone pads that deliver a dramatic, pinch-free curl.

name: Zamalek Vanity Silicone Brush Cleanser
description: A compact, textured silicone mat designed to easily extract makeup residue from brushes and sponges without damaging them.

name: Nile Mist Microfine Setting Spray Bottle
description: A continuous-spray bottle that releases an ultra-fine mist, ideal for refreshing makeup or setting looks in warm climates.

name: Alexandria Shell Sponge Holder
description: A beautiful ceramic sponge stand shaped like a seashell, allowing your beauty blender to air-dry hygienically and stylishly.

name: Sahara Bronze Dual-Ended Lash Comb
description: A dual-ended metal lash comb and brow brush that defines and separates lashes, eliminating clumps for a polished look.

name: Dahab Dream Beauty Organizer
description: A multi-compartment acrylic cosmetic organizer that stores your nails, lashes, and tools in a sleek, transparent display.

name: Cleopatra Royal Gold Cosmetic Mirror
description: A double-sided travel mirror featuring 5x magnification and a brilliant gold finish, fit for a modern queen.

name: Lotus Blossom Powder Puff Duo
description: Two ultra-soft, triangular powder puffs designed to set makeup under the eyes and around the t-zone for a velvety matte finish.

name: Cairo Chic Microfiber Makeup Remover Pads
description: Three reusable, dual-sided microfiber pads that gently remove makeup using only warm water, offering an eco-friendly routine.

name: Royal Velvet Keepsake Gift Box
description: An opulent, deep-red velvet gift box designed for curated boutique collections, finished with gold clasp hardware.
